fullChinese: 互联网最大的优势在于它极大地简化了人与人之间的沟通。
finalEnglish: The greatest advantage of the internet is that it makes communication much easier between people.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构，表语由that引导的表语从句充当。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 优势是它简化了沟通。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干结构，注意"优势"是advantage，"简化"用make...easier
steps.correctAnswer: The advantage is that it makes communication.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【最大的】优势是它简化了【更便捷的】沟通。
steps.hint: "最大的"是greatest，"更便捷的"是easier
steps.correctAnswer: The greatest advantage is that it makes communication easier.

steps.label: 添加主语限定和状语
steps.chinese: 【互联网】最大的优势在于它【极大地】简化了【人与人之间的】沟通。
steps.hint: "互联网"是of the internet，"极大地"是much，"人与人之间的"是between people
steps.correctAnswer: The greatest advantage of the internet is that it makes communication much easier between people.

fullChinese: 例如，一些留学的学生无需担心思乡之情带来的困扰，因为他们可以通过 FaceTime 等即时通讯工具与家人保持日常联系。
finalEnglish: For example, when some students studying abroad, they would not be bothered by the problem of homesickness, as they are enabled by instant communication tools, such as FaceTime, to talk with their families on a daily basis.
logicExplanation: 主句 + as原因状语从句，主句前有when时间状语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 他们不会受到困扰。
steps.hint: 主句核心：they would not be bothered
steps.correctAnswer: They would not be bothered.
keywords: would not be bothered (不会受到困扰)

steps.label: 添加状语和施动者
steps.chinese: 【例如】，【留学的】学生不会受到【思乡之情带来的】困扰。
steps.hint: For example引导；by the problem of homesickness是被动语态的施动者
steps.correctAnswer: For example, when some students studying abroad, they would not be bothered by the problem of homesickness.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 例如，留学的学生不会受到思乡之情带来的困扰，【因为他们可以通过即时通讯工具与家人保持日常联系】。
steps.hint: as引导原因状语从句
steps.correctAnswer: For example, when some students studying abroad, they would not be bothered by the problem of homesickness, as they are enabled by instant communication tools, such as FaceTime, to talk with their families on a daily basis.
keywords: instant communication tools (即时通讯工具)

fullChinese: 此外，患有相同疾病的患者还能建立在线社区，在那里分享战胜疾病的励志故事以及有助于康复的实用信息。
finalEnglish: In addition, people suffering from the same disease are able to establish an online community where they can share inspiring stories of fighting diseases as well as useful information for recovery.
logicExplanation: 主谓宾结构，宾语后接where引导的定语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 人们能够建立社区。
steps.hint: In addition, people are able to establish a community
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, people are able to establish a community.

steps.label: 添加主语修饰
steps.chinese: 【患有相同疾病的】人们能够建立【在线】社区。
steps.hint: people suffering from the same disease作主语修饰
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, people suffering from the same disease are able to establish an online community.

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 患有相同疾病的人们能够建立在线社区，【在那里分享战胜疾病的励志故事以及有助于康复的实用信息】。
steps.hint: where引导定语从句修饰community
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, people suffering from the same disease are able to establish an online community where they can share inspiring stories of fighting diseases as well as useful information for recovery.

fullChinese: 科技能够有效助力传统技能与生活方式的传承。
finalEnglish: Technology can positively contribute to the keeping alive of traditional skills and ways of life.
logicExplanation: 简单主谓宾结构，contribute to 后接名词短语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 科技能够助力传承。
steps.hint: Technology can contribute to the keeping alive
steps.correctAnswer: Technology can contribute to the keeping alive.

steps.chinese: 科技能够【有效】助力【传统技能与生活方式的】传承。
steps.hint: positively修饰contribute；of traditional skills and ways of life修饰the keeping alive
steps.correctAnswer: Technology can positively contribute to the keeping alive of traditional skills and ways of life.

fullChinese: 例如，某些岛屿的人口过于稀少，难以建立正规学校。
finalEnglish: For example, the populations of some islands are too small to have normal schools.
logicExplanation: too...to... 结构，主系表 + 不定式结果状语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 例如，人口过于稀少，难以建立学校。
steps.hint: For example, the populations are too small to have schools
steps.correctAnswer: For example, the populations are too small to have schools.
keywords: too small to (过于…以至于不能)

steps.label: 添加主语修饰和宾语修饰
steps.chinese: 例如，【某些岛屿的】人口过于稀少，难以建立【正规的】学校。
steps.hint: of some islands修饰the populations；normal修饰schools
steps.correctAnswer: For example, the populations of some islands are too small to have normal schools.

fullChinese: 教育部门并未通过将儿童送往大陆而拆散家庭，而是利用互联网实现了在线教育。
finalEnglish: Rather than breaking up families by sending children to the mainland, education authorities have been able to use the Internet to deliver schooling online.
logicExplanation: Rather than... 结构作状语，主句为现在完成时。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 教育部门利用互联网实现了教育。
steps.hint: education authorities have been able to use the Internet to deliver schooling
steps.correctAnswer: Education authorities have been able to use the Internet to deliver schooling.
keywords: have been able to (已经能够)

steps.label: 添加Rather than状语和方式状语
steps.chinese: 【教育部门并未通过将儿童送往大陆而拆散家庭，而是】利用互联网实现了【在线】教育。
steps.hint: Rather than breaking up families by sending children to the mainland放句首
steps.correctAnswer: Rather than breaking up families by sending children to the mainland, education authorities have been able to use the Internet to deliver schooling online.
keywords: sending children to the mainland (将儿童送往大陆)

fullChinese: 此外，互联网与现代冷藏技术正被用于保护鲑鱼养殖的传统技艺，因为如今鲑鱼产品可从全球任何地方订购并配送至目的地。
finalEnglish: In addition, the Internet and modern refrigeration techniques are being used to keep alive the traditional skills of producing salmon, because it can now be ordered from, and delivered to, anywhere in the world.
logicExplanation: 主句（被动语态）+ because 原因状语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 互联网与现代冷藏技术正被用于保护传统技艺。
steps.hint: 主语是复数，注意被动语态"are being used"
steps.correctAnswer: The Internet and modern refrigeration techniques are being used to keep alive traditional skills.
keywords: the Internet and modern refrigeration techniques (互联网与现代冷藏技术)

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【此外，】互联网与现代冷藏技术正被用于保护传统技艺。
steps.hint: "此外"是In addition，放在句首
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, the Internet and modern refrigeration techniques are being used to keep alive traditional skills.

steps.label: 添加宾语修饰
steps.chinese: 此外，互联网与现代冷藏技术正被用于保护【鲑鱼养殖的】传统技艺。
steps.hint: "鲑鱼养殖"是producing salmon
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, the Internet and modern refrigeration techniques are being used to keep alive the traditional skills of producing salmon.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 此外，互联网与现代冷藏技术正被用于保护鲑鱼养殖的传统技艺，【因为如今鲑鱼产品可从全球任何地方订购并配送至目的地】。
steps.hint: "因为"是because，"订购"是ordered，"配送"是delivered
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, the Internet and modern refrigeration techniques are being used to keep alive the traditional skills of producing salmon, because it can now be ordered from, and delivered to, anywhere in the world.
keywords: anywhere in the world (全球任何地方)

fullChinese: 尽管如此，计算机技能对幼儿带来的明显益处不容忽视。
finalEnglish: In spite of this, the obvious benefits of computer skills for young children cannot be denied.
logicExplanation: 简单句，介词短语开头，主语 + 被动谓语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 尽管如此，益处不容忽视。
steps.hint: In spite of this, the benefits cannot be denied
steps.correctAnswer: In spite of this, the benefits cannot be denied.
keywords: In spite of this (尽管如此)

steps.label: 添加主语修饰
steps.chinese: 尽管如此，【计算机技能对幼儿带来的】【明显的】益处不容忽视。
steps.hint: of computer skills for young children修饰benefits；obvious修饰benefits
steps.correctAnswer: In spite of this, the obvious benefits of computer skills for young children cannot be denied.

fullChinese: 他们的成年世界将在技术领域持续变革，而互联网正是当今世界所有知识与信息的关键载体。
finalEnglish: Their adult world will be changing constantly in terms of technology and the Internet is the key to all the knowledge and information available in the world today.
logicExplanation: and 连接两个并列分句，第二个分句是主系表结构。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 他们的成年世界将持续变革，而互联网是关键。
steps.hint: Their adult world will be changing constantly and the Internet is the key
steps.correctAnswer: Their adult world will be changing constantly and the Internet is the key.
keywords: will be changing constantly (将持续变革)

steps.label: 添加状语和修饰语
steps.chinese: 他们的成年世界将【在技术领域】持续变革，而互联网正是【当今世界所有知识与信息的】【关键载体】。
steps.hint: in terms of technology修饰changing；to all the knowledge and information修饰key；available in the world today是后置定语
steps.correctAnswer: Their adult world will be changing constantly in terms of technology and the Internet is the key to all the knowledge and information available in the world today.

fullChinese: 因此，儿童应尽早学会热情且自信地使用各类设备，并且这些技能将伴随他们整个学习和职业生涯。
finalEnglish: Therefore, it is important that children learn at an early age to use the equipment enthusiastically and with confidence as they will need these skills throughout their studies and working lives.
logicExplanation: it is important that... 主句 + as 原因状语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 因此，儿童应学会使用设备。
steps.hint: Therefore, it is important that children learn to use the equipment
steps.correctAnswer: Therefore, it is important that children learn to use the equipment.
keywords: it is important that (重要的是)

steps.label: 添加状语修饰
steps.chinese: 因此，儿童应【尽早】学会【热情且自信地】使用【各类】设备。
steps.hint: at an early age表示时间；enthusiastically and with confidence表示方式
steps.correctAnswer: Therefore, it is important that children learn at an early age to use the equipment enthusiastically and with confidence.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 因此，儿童应尽早学会热情且自信地使用各类设备，【并且这些技能将伴随他们整个学习和职业生涯】。
steps.hint: as引导原因从句
steps.correctAnswer: Therefore, it is important that children learn at an early age to use the equipment enthusiastically and with confidence as they will need these skills throughout their studies and working lives.
keywords: studies and working lives (学习和职业生涯)

fullChinese: 一方面，从某些乐观主义者的角度来看，与外星生命体建立联系可能带来巨大益处。
finalEnglish: On the one hand, from the perspective of some optimists, there may be great benefits to connecting alien life forms.
logicExplanation: there be 句型，前面有两个介词短语作状语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 一方面，可能带来益处。
steps.hint: On the one hand, there may be benefits
steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, there may be benefits.

steps.label: 添加状语和宾语修饰
steps.chinese: 一方面，【从某些乐观主义者的角度来看】，【与外星生命体建立联系】可能带来【巨大的】益处。
steps.hint: from the perspective of some optimists是观点状语；to connecting alien life forms说明益处来源；great修饰benefits
steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, from the perspective of some optimists, there may be great benefits to connecting alien life forms.
keywords: from the perspective of (从…的角度来看)

fullChinese: 我们的太空邻居很可能会分享其更为先进的技术，帮助我们解决地球上的诸多问题。
finalEnglish: It is likely that our neighbours in space would lend us their far more advanced technologies to solve a series of problems on the Earth.
logicExplanation: It is likely that... 形式主语句，that从句中含不定式目的状语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 很可能会分享技术。
steps.hint: It is likely that our neighbours would lend us their technologies
steps.correctAnswer: It is likely that our neighbours would lend us their technologies.
keywords: It is likely that (很可能会)

steps.label: 添加主语修饰、宾语修饰和目的状语
steps.chinese: 【我们的太空邻居】很可能会分享其【更为先进的】技术，【帮助我们解决地球上的诸多问题】。
steps.hint: in space修饰neighbours；far more advanced修饰technologies；to solve a series of problems on the Earth是目的状语
steps.correctAnswer: It is likely that our neighbours in space would lend us their far more advanced technologies to solve a series of problems on the Earth.

fullChinese: 例如，如果我们能通过外星友人的技术支持实现自身进步，环境污染或许就能被彻底消除，威胁生命的疾病也可能得到治愈。
finalEnglish: For example, environmental pollution could be eradicated and life-threatening diseases could be cured if we are technologically improved by our alien friends.
logicExplanation: and 连接两个并列被动句，if 条件状语从句后置。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 例如，环境污染能被消除，疾病也能被治愈。
steps.hint: For example, environmental pollution could be eradicated and diseases could be cured
steps.correctAnswer: For example, environmental pollution could be eradicated and diseases could be cured.
keywords: could be eradicated (能被彻底消除)

steps.label: 添加主语修饰和条件状语从句
steps.chinese: 例如，【威胁生命的】疾病也能被治愈，【如果我们能通过外星友人的技术支持实现自身进步】。
steps.hint: life-threatening修饰diseases；if we are technologically improved by our alien friends表示条件
steps.correctAnswer: For example, environmental pollution could be eradicated and life-threatening diseases could be cured if we are technologically improved by our alien friends.
keywords: technologically improved (在技术上实现进步)

fullChinese: 更重要的是，在他们的帮助下，人类或许能够取得重大突破，实现超越地球的生存目标。
finalEnglish: What's more, with their help and assistance, human beings may be able to make a significant step forward to live beyond the Earth.
logicExplanation: with 介词短语作状语，主谓宾 + 不定式目的状语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 更重要的是，人类或许能够取得突破。
steps.hint: What's more, human beings may be able to make a step forward
steps.correctAnswer: What's more, human beings may be able to make a step forward.
keywords: make a step forward (取得突破)

steps.label: 添加状语和目的
steps.chinese: 更重要的是，【在他们的帮助下】，人类或许能够取得【重大的】突破，【实现超越地球的生存目标】。
steps.hint: with their help and assistance是方式状语；significant修饰step；to live beyond the Earth是目的状语
steps.correctAnswer: What's more, with their help and assistance, human beings may be able to make a significant step forward to live beyond the Earth.
keywords: with their help (在他们的帮助下)
to live beyond the Earth (实现超越地球的生存目标)

fullChinese: 这意味着我们将不再担心面临任何可能摧毁我们家园星球的灾难。
finalEnglish: This means that we would no longer be afraid of facing any catastrophe that might destroy our home planet.
logicExplanation: 主谓宾结构，宾语是that从句，从句中含that定语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 这意味着我们将不再担心面临灾难。
steps.hint: This means that we would no longer be afraid of facing any catastrophe
steps.correctAnswer: This means that we would no longer be afraid of facing any catastrophe.

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 这意味着我们将不再担心面临【任何可能摧毁我们家园星球的】灾难。
steps.hint: that might destroy our home planet是定语从句修饰catastrophe
steps.correctAnswer: This means that we would no longer be afraid of facing any catastrophe that might destroy our home planet.

fullChinese: 政府对医疗保健和医学研究的投资在每个社会中都发挥着极其重要的作用。
finalEnglish: Government investment in healthcare and medical research has an extremely important role to play in every society.
logicExplanation: 简单主谓宾结构，主语和宾语各有介词短语修饰。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 政府投资发挥着作用。
steps.hint: Government investment has a role to play
steps.correctAnswer: Government investment has a role to play.
keywords: has a role to play (发挥着作用)

steps.label: 添加主语修饰、宾语修饰和状语
steps.chinese: 【政府对医疗保健和医学研究的】投资【在每个社会中都】【发挥着极其重要的】作用。
steps.hint: in healthcare and medical research修饰investment；extremely important修饰role；in every society是地点状语
steps.correctAnswer: Government investment in healthcare and medical research has an extremely important role to play in every society.
keywords: in every society (在每个社会中)

fullChinese: 例如，如果能为幼儿提供更多免费疫苗，婴儿和儿童死亡率就能显著降低，从而为国家发展培养出更健康的下一代人口。
finalEnglish: For example, if more free vaccines are available to young children, infant and child mortality rates could be remarkably reduced, which contributes a healthier generation of population to the development of a country.
logicExplanation: if 条件状语从句 + 主句 + which 非限制性定语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 死亡率能降低。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干，"死亡率"是mortality rates
steps.correctAnswer: Mortality rates could be reduced.

steps.label: 添加条件状语
steps.chinese: 【例如，如果提供更多疫苗，】死亡率能降低。
steps.hint: "例如"是For example，"如果"是if，"更多疫苗"是more vaccines
steps.correctAnswer: For example, if more vaccines are available, mortality rates could be reduced.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 例如，如果能为【幼儿】提供更多【免费的】疫苗，【婴儿和儿童】死亡率能【显著】降低。
steps.hint: "幼儿"是young children，"免费的"是free，"婴儿和儿童"是infant and child
steps.correctAnswer: For example, if more free vaccines are available to young children, infant and child mortality rates could be remarkably reduced.

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 例如，如果能为幼儿提供更多免费疫苗，婴儿和儿童死亡率能显著降低，【从而为国家发展培养出更健康的下一代人口】。
steps.hint: which引导非限制性定语从句
steps.correctAnswer: For example, if more free vaccines are available to young children, infant and child mortality rates could be remarkably reduced, which contributes a healthier generation of population to the development of a country.

fullChinese: 此外，如果政府在经济上支持研发患者负担得起的新药，患者获得适当治疗并因此康复的可能性将大大增加。
finalEnglish: In addition, if the government financially supports the research of new medicines that are more affordable to patients, there may be much higher possibilities for them to receive proper medical treatment and therefore be cured.
logicExplanation: if 条件状语从句（内嵌定语从句）+ there be 主句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 可能性将增加。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干，"可能性"是possibilities
steps.correctAnswer: There may be higher possibilities.

steps.label: 添加条件状语
steps.chinese: 【此外，如果政府支持研发，】可能性将增加。
steps.hint: "此外"是In addition，"如果"是if
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, if the government supports the research, there may be higher possibilities.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 此外，如果政府【在经济上】支持研发【患者负担得起的新药】，可能性将【大大】增加。
steps.hint: "在经济上"是financially，"负担得起"是affordable
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, if the government financially supports the research of new medicines that are more affordable to patients, there may be much higher possibilities.

steps.label: 添加结果状语
steps.chinese: 此外，如果政府在经济上支持研发患者负担得起的新药，可能性将大大增加，【患者获得适当治疗并因此康复】。
steps.hint: "获得治疗"是receive treatment，"康复"是be cured
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, if the government financially supports the research of new medicines that are more affordable to patients, there may be much higher possibilities for them to receive proper medical treatment and therefore be cured.

fullChinese: 如果没有这样的投资，就很难以低成本为患者提供有效的医疗服务，因为以盈利为导向的企业不愿投入资金进行研发。
finalEnglish: Without such investment, it would be difficult to provide patients with effective medical care at a low cost, as profit-driven companies are not willing to pour money into the research.
logicExplanation: 介词短语开头 + it作形式主语 + as原因状语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 很难提供医疗服务。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干，"很难"是difficult
steps.correctAnswer: It would be difficult to provide medical care.

steps.label: 添加条件状语
steps.chinese: 【如果没有投资，】很难提供医疗服务。
steps.hint: "如果没有"是Without
steps.correctAnswer: Without investment, it would be difficult to provide medical care.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 如果没有【这样的】投资，很难为【患者】提供【有效的】医疗服务【以低成本】。
steps.hint: "这样的"是such，"有效的"是effective
steps.correctAnswer: Without such investment, it would be difficult to provide patients with effective medical care at a low cost.

steps.label: 添加原因状语
steps.chinese: 如果没有这样的投资，很难以低成本为患者提供有效的医疗服务，【因为以盈利为导向的企业不愿投入资金进行研发】。
steps.hint: "因为"是as，"以盈利为导向"是profit-driven
steps.correctAnswer: Without such investment, it would be difficult to provide patients with effective medical care at a low cost, as profit-driven companies are not willing to pour money into the research.

fullChinese: 一方面，我必须承认，在媒体的帮助下，了解世界各地不同文化变得异常便捷。
finalEnglish: On the one hand, I admit that getting acquainted with culture of different places across the world has become incredibly easy and convenient with the help of media.
logicExplanation: 主谓宾结构，宾语是that从句（主语为动名词短语）。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 一方面，我承认了解文化变得便捷。

steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, I admit that getting acquainted with culture has become easy and convenient.

steps.label: 添加从句内修饰
steps.chinese: 一方面，我承认，了解【世界各地不同的】文化变得【异常】便捷。
steps.hint: of different places across the world修饰culture；incredibly修饰easy and convenient
steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, I admit that getting acquainted with culture of different places across the world has become incredibly easy and convenient.

steps.label: 添加方式状语
steps.chinese: 一方面，我必须承认，【在媒体的帮助下】，了解世界各地不同文化变得异常便捷。
steps.hint: with the help of media放在句末，表示方式
steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, I admit that getting acquainted with culture of different places across the world has become incredibly easy and convenient with the help of media.

fullChinese: 例如，有成千上万的书籍和杂志（如《孤独星球》）生动地描绘了数千英里外城市中人们的生活场景。
finalEnglish: For example, there are thousands of books and magazines, such as Lonely Planet, vividly picturing how people live their daily lives in a city thousands of miles away from the reader.
logicExplanation: there be 句型，现在分词短语作定语，内嵌how宾语从句。

steps.correctAnswer: For example, there are books and magazines, picturing how people live their daily lives.

steps.label: 添加数量修饰和举例
steps.chinese: 例如，有【成千上万的】书籍和杂志（如【《孤独星球》】）生动地描绘了人们的生活。
steps.hint: thousands of修饰books and magazines；such as Lonely Planet是举例
steps.correctAnswer: For example, there are thousands of books and magazines, such as Lonely Planet, picturing how people live their daily lives.

steps.label: 添加地点修饰

steps.hint: in a city thousands of miles away from the reader修饰地点；vividly修饰picturing
steps.correctAnswer: For example, there are thousands of books and magazines, such as Lonely Planet, vividly picturing how people live their daily lives in a city thousands of miles away from the reader.

fullChinese: 关于当地饮食传统和节日庆典的信息几乎无需耗费时间和金钱即可获取。
finalEnglish: Information about their food tradition and festival celebration can be accessed at almost no cost of time and money.

steps.correctAnswer: Information can be accessed.

steps.correctAnswer: Information about their food tradition and festival celebration can be accessed at almost no cost of time and money.

fullChinese: 同样地，观看电影也能让观众身临其境地体验与自身截然不同的生活方式。
finalEnglish: In a similar way, watching movies brings viewers close to a lifestyle totally different from their own.

steps.hint: totally different from their own修饰lifestyle
steps.correctAnswer: In a similar way, watching movies brings viewers close to a lifestyle totally different from their own.
keywords: totally different from (与…截然不同的)

fullChinese: 以印度电影为例，它让人们深刻体会到歌唱和舞蹈对印度文化的重要性。
finalEnglish: Indian movies, for example, let people know how important singing and dancing is to the Indians.

steps.label: 添加插入语和宾语从句补充

steps.correctAnswer: Indian movies, for example, let people know how important singing and dancing is to the Indians.

fullChinese: 音乐是我们一生中始终相伴的存在。
finalEnglish: Music is something that accompanies all of us throughout our lives.

steps.hint: that accompanies all of us throughout our lives修饰something
steps.correctAnswer: Music is something that accompanies all of us throughout our lives.

fullChinese: 童年时期，父母和老师会教我们唱歌——这既是学习语言的方式，也纯粹是一种娱乐形式。
finalEnglish: As children, we are taught songs by our parents and teachers as a means of learning language, or simply as a form of enjoyment.
logicExplanation: 被动语态主句，as 短语表示身份和目的。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 童年时期，我们被教唱歌。

steps.correctAnswer: As children, we are taught songs by our parents and teachers.

steps.hint: as a means of learning language和or simply as a form of enjoyment是两个并列的as短语
steps.correctAnswer: As children, we are taught songs by our parents and teachers as a means of learning language, or simply as a form of enjoyment.

fullChinese: 孩子们乐于与他人一起歌唱，而集体歌唱似乎能促进参与者之间建立联系，无论年龄大小。
finalEnglish: Children delight in singing with others, and it would appear that the act of singing in a group creates a connection between participants, regardless of their age.
logicExplanation: and 连接两个并列分句，第二分句含that从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干

steps.chinese: 孩子们乐于【与他人一起】歌唱。
steps.hint: "与他人一起"是with others

steps.label: 添加并列句
steps.chinese: 孩子们乐于与他人一起歌唱，【而集体歌唱似乎能促进参与者之间建立联系】。
steps.hint: "而"是and，"集体歌唱"是singing in a group
steps.correctAnswer: Children delight in singing with others, and it would appear that the act of singing in a group creates a connection between participants.
keywords: singing in a group (集体歌唱)

steps.label: 添加条件状语

steps.hint: "无论"是regardless of
steps.correctAnswer: Children delight in singing with others, and it would appear that the act of singing in a group creates a connection between participants, regardless of their age.

fullChinese: 随着年龄增长，人们的音乐偏好逐渐形成，我们逐渐将喜爱的歌曲视为人生故事的一部分。
finalEnglish: Later in life, people's musical preferences develop, and we come to see our favorite songs as part of our lifestories.
logicExplanation: and 连接两个并列分句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 偏好形成，我们将歌曲视为人生故事的一部分。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干，注意"视为"是see...as

steps.label: 添加修饰语

steps.correctAnswer: Later in life, people's musical preferences develop, and we come to see our favorite songs as part of our lifestories.
keywords: Later in life (随着年龄增长)

fullChinese: 音乐能够以文字无法企及的方式表达并激发情感。

steps.hint: in a way that words alone cannot修饰expresses and arouses
steps.correctAnswer: Music both expresses and arouses emotions in a way that words alone cannot.

fullChinese: 简而言之，很难想象没有音乐的生活。
finalEnglish: In short, it is difficult to imagine life without it.
logicExplanation: it作形式主语，不定式短语是真正主语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 很难想象生活。

steps.correctAnswer: It is difficult to imagine life.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【简而言之，】很难想象【没有音乐的】生活。
steps.hint: "简而言之"是In short，"没有音乐的"是without it
steps.correctAnswer: In short, it is difficult to imagine life without it.

fullChinese: 另一方面，许多人认为良好的心理素质在很大程度上决定了体育比赛的结果。

steps.label: 添加插入语和修饰语

steps.hint: good修饰mentality；to a great extent是插入语；sports修饰competitions
steps.correctAnswer: On the other hand, many people believe that a good mentality, to a great extent, determines the results of sports competitions.
keywords: to a great extent (在很大程度上)

fullChinese: 具体而言，那些志在夺牌的运动员必须在整个比赛中保持冷静，即使面对艰难险阻也不轻易放弃。
finalEnglish: More specifically, athletes aiming at winning medals must be able to stay calm throughout the game or not easily give up the game even in an uphill battle.
logicExplanation: 主谓宾结构，主语有分词短语修饰，谓语由or连接两个并列部分。

steps.chinese: 运动员必须保持冷静。
steps.hint: 先翻译主干，"运动员"是athletes，"保持冷静"是stay calm
steps.correctAnswer: Athletes must be able to stay calm.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【具体而言，】【志在夺牌的】运动员必须保持冷静。

steps.correctAnswer: More specifically, athletes aiming at winning medals must be able to stay calm.
keywords: aiming at winning medals (志在夺牌)

steps.label: 添加并列结构

steps.hint: "不轻易放弃"是not easily give up
steps.correctAnswer: More specifically, athletes aiming at winning medals must be able to stay calm throughout the game or not easily give up the game.

steps.label: 添加条件状语
steps.chinese: 具体而言，志在夺牌的运动员必须在整个比赛中保持冷静，或者【即使面对艰难险阻也不】轻易放弃。

fullChinese: 射击比赛便是最明显的例证：在该项目中，专注于靶心且不受观众干扰的能力远比身体力量更为重要。

steps.label: 纯净主干

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 最明显的例证是射击比赛，【在该项目中，专注于靶心且不受观众干扰的能力远比身体力量更为重要】。
steps.hint: where引导定语从句
steps.correctAnswer: One of the most obvious examples of this is the shooting competition where the ability to focus on the target and not to be affected by the crowds is far more important than physical strength.

fullChinese: 举办奥运会能让主办国在经济增长和公共卫生方面获得双重效益。
finalEnglish: Holding the Olympic Games allows the host country to reap benefits in terms of economic growth and public health.
logicExplanation: 动名词作主语，主谓宾 + 宾补 + 介词短语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 举办奥运会能让主办国获得效益。

steps.correctAnswer: Holding the Olympic Games allows the host country to reap benefits.
keywords: Holding the Olympic Games (举办奥运会)

steps.label: 添加介词短语修饰
steps.chinese: 举办奥运会能让主办国【在经济增长和公共卫生方面】获得效益。
steps.hint: in terms of economic growth and public health修饰reap benefits
steps.correctAnswer: Holding the Olympic Games allows the host country to reap benefits in terms of economic growth and public health.

fullChinese: 就经济增长而言，数百万民众会前往主办国观看世界级体育赛事或体验当地文化，这两项活动均能带来数十亿美元的经济收益并创造大量就业机会。

steps.label: 纯净主干

steps.correctAnswer: With regard to the former, millions of people are attracted to the host country either to watch sports games or to experience local culture.
keywords: With regard to the former (就前者而言)

steps.label: 添加宾语修饰
steps.chinese: 就前者而言，数百万人被吸引到主办国观看【世界级】体育赛事或体验当地文化。
steps.hint: world-class修饰sports games
steps.correctAnswer: With regard to the former, millions of people are attracted to the host country either to watch world-class sports games or to experience local culture.

steps.label: 添加非限制性定语从句
steps.chinese: 就前者而言，数百万人被吸引到主办国观看世界级体育赛事或体验当地文化，【这两项活动均能带来数十亿美元的经济收益并创造大量就业机会】。
steps.hint: both of which引导非限制性定语从句
steps.correctAnswer: With regard to the former, millions of people are attracted to the host country either to watch world-class sports games or to experience local culture, both of which bring in billions of dollars in cash and create a large number of job opportunities.
keywords: both of which (这两项活动均)
create a large number of (创造大量)

fullChinese: 此外，举办这一国际赛事还能激发大多数民众对体育运动的兴趣，促使他们增加身体活动量。

steps.chinese: 另一贡献是能为【大多数民众】激发【对体育运动的】兴趣。

steps.label: 添加并列句
steps.chinese: 另一贡献是能为大多数民众激发对体育运动的兴趣，【促使他们增加身体活动量】。
steps.hint: "促使"是and they would，"增加身体活动量"是become more physically active
steps.correctAnswer: The other contribution is that an interest in sports can be developed for most citizens, and they would become more physically active.

steps.label: 添加主语修饰
steps.chinese: 【举办这一国际赛事还能】另一贡献是能为大多数民众激发对体育运动的兴趣，促使他们增加身体活动量。
steps.hint: "举办这一国际赛事"是made by hosting this international event
steps.correctAnswer: The other contribution made by hosting this international event is that an interest in sports can be developed for most citizens, and they would become more physically active.
keywords: hosting this international event (举办这一国际赛事)

fullChinese: 从而提升整体人口的健康水平。
finalEnglish: As a result, the level of health in the general population can be improved.
logicExplanation: 简单被动句，介词短语开头。

steps.correctAnswer: Neighbours meet and talk.

steps.chinese: 邻居们【几乎不再】【互相】见面交谈。
steps.hint: barely表几乎不，with each other表互相
steps.correctAnswer: Neighbours barely meet and talk with each other.

steps.label: 添加过渡词和时间
steps.chinese: 【然而】【如今】，邻居们几乎不再见面交谈。
steps.hint: Today表时间，however表转折
steps.correctAnswer: Today, however, neighbours barely meet and talk with each other.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 然而如今，邻居们几乎不再见面交谈，【因为他们更热衷于在线分享八卦和照片】。
steps.hint: as引导原因状语从句
steps.correctAnswer: Today, however, neighbours barely meet and talk with each other, as they are more addicted to online sharing of gossips and pictures.

fullChinese: 精心规划假期旅行至关重要，这不仅能帮助人们节省开支，还能让假期过得更加愉快。
finalEnglish: It is important to plan a holiday trip carefully, because it helps people to save money as well as enjoy the vacation better.
logicExplanation: 形式主语结构+原因状语从句，as well as连接并列好处。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 规划旅行至关重要。
steps.hint: It is important to plan a holiday trip
steps.correctAnswer: It is important to plan a holiday trip.

steps.label: 添加副词修饰
steps.chinese: 【精心】规划假期旅行至关重要。
steps.hint: carefully放在动词后修饰plan
steps.correctAnswer: It is important to plan a holiday trip carefully.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 精心规划假期旅行至关重要，【因为这能帮助人们节省开支，还能让假期过得更加愉快】。
steps.hint: because引导原因从句，as well as连接两个并列好处
steps.correctAnswer: It is important to plan a holiday trip carefully, because it helps people to save money as well as enjoy the vacation better.

fullChinese: 例如，人们需要考虑为交通、餐饮和住宿等各项开支预留多少预算。
finalEnglish: For example, people need to think about how much money to allot for things including transportation, food, and hotels.
logicExplanation: 主句+宾语从句（疑问词+不定式），including表举例。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 人们需要考虑预留多少预算。
steps.hint: People need to think about how much money to allot
steps.correctAnswer: People need to think about how much money to allot.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 人们需要考虑【为各项开支】预留多少预算。
steps.hint: for things表为各项开支
steps.correctAnswer: People need to think about how much money to allot for things.

steps.label: 添加举例
steps.chinese: 人们需要考虑为各项开支预留多少预算，【包括交通、餐饮和住宿】。
steps.hint: including表包括
steps.correctAnswer: People need to think about how much money to allot for things including transportation, food, and hotels.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【例如】，人们需要考虑为交通、餐饮和住宿等各项开支预留多少预算。
steps.hint: For example放句首
steps.correctAnswer: For example, people need to think about how much money to allot for things including transportation, food, and hotels.

fullChinese: 特别是在旅游旺季，若未提前足够时间预订，酒店和交通费用可能会变得极其高昂。
finalEnglish: In particular, hotels and transportation at peak seasons can be incredibly expensive if not booked with plenty of time in advance.
logicExplanation: 主句+条件状语从句（省略形式），过渡词强调特殊情况。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 酒店和交通费用可能会变得高昂。
steps.hint: Hotels and transportation can be expensive
steps.correctAnswer: Hotels and transportation can be expensive.

steps.label: 添加程度副词
steps.chinese: 酒店和交通费用可能会变得【极其】高昂。
steps.hint: incredibly修饰expensive
steps.correctAnswer: Hotels and transportation can be incredibly expensive.

steps.label: 添加条件状语从句
steps.chinese: 酒店和交通费用可能会变得极其高昂，【若未提前足够时间预订】。
steps.hint: if not booked是省略形式
steps.correctAnswer: Hotels and transportation can be incredibly expensive if not booked with plenty of time in advance.

steps.label: 添加过渡词和时间
steps.chinese: 【特别是在旅游旺季】，若未提前足够时间预订，酒店和交通费用可能会变得极其高昂。
steps.hint: In particular表强调，at peak seasons表在旅游旺季
steps.correctAnswer: In particular, hotels and transportation at peak seasons can be incredibly expensive if not booked with plenty of time in advance.

fullChinese: 此外，如果游客能提前制定详细计划，在一个国家最重要的节日期间前往游览，就能更深入地体验当地文化，从而获得更加难忘的旅行体验。
finalEnglish: In addition, if tourists make a precise plan to pay a visit to a country during its most important festivals, then they will be able to engage more in local culture and therefore have more memorable experience.
logicExplanation: 条件状语从句+主句+结果状语，therefore连接因果关系。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 游客能体验文化，获得体验。
steps.hint: Tourists will be able to engage in local culture and have memorable experience
steps.correctAnswer: Tourists will be able to engage in local culture and have memorable experience.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 游客能【更深入地】体验【当地】文化，【从而】获得【更加难忘的旅行】体验。
steps.hint: more修饰engage，local修饰culture，therefore表从而
steps.correctAnswer: Tourists will be able to engage more in local culture and therefore have more memorable experience.

steps.label: 添加条件状语从句
steps.chinese: 【如果游客能提前制定详细计划，在一个国家最重要的节日期间前往游览】，就能更深入地体验当地文化，从而获得更加难忘的旅行体验。
steps.hint: if引导条件从句
steps.correctAnswer: If tourists make a precise plan to pay a visit to a country during its most important festivals, then they will be able to engage more in local culture and therefore have more memorable experience.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【此外】，如果游客能提前制定详细计划，在一个国家最重要的节日期间前往游览，就能更深入地体验当地文化，从而获得更加难忘的旅行体验。
steps.hint: In addition放句首
steps.correctAnswer: In addition, if tourists make a precise plan to pay a visit to a country during its most important festivals, then they will be able to engage more in local culture and therefore have more memorable experience.

fullChinese: 城市之间日益增强的相似性，是城市人口增长带来的结果。
finalEnglish: The increasing similarity between cities is a result of the growth of urban population.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构，主语和表语都有复杂修饰。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 相似性是结果。
steps.hint: The similarity is a result of the growth
steps.correctAnswer: The similarity is a result of the growth.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【城市之间】【日益增强的】相似性，是【城市人口增长带来的】结果。
steps.hint: increasing表日益增强的，between cities表城市之间，urban population表城市人口
steps.correctAnswer: The increasing similarity between cities is a result of the growth of urban population.

fullChinese: 随着越来越多的人选择在大城市生活和工作，政府不得不持续建造现代化高层建筑，以满足居民和企业对更多空间的需求。
finalEnglish: As more and more people choose to live and work in big cities, the government has to keep building modern high-rise buildings to meet the needs of more space for either residence or business.
logicExplanation: 原因状语从句（As）+主句+目的状语，either...or连接并列对象。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 政府建造建筑以满足需求。
steps.hint: The government has to keep building buildings to meet the needs
steps.correctAnswer: The government has to keep building buildings to meet the needs.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 政府【不得不】【持续】建造【现代化高层】建筑以满足【对更多空间的】需求。
steps.hint: modern high-rise表现代化高层，of more space表对更多空间的
steps.correctAnswer: The government has to keep building modern high-rise buildings to meet the needs of more space.

steps.label: 添加目的补充
steps.chinese: 政府不得不持续建造现代化高层建筑以满足对更多空间的需求，【无论是居住还是商业】。
steps.hint: for either residence or business表无论是居住还是商业
steps.correctAnswer: The government has to keep building modern high-rise buildings to meet the needs of more space for either residence or business.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 【随着越来越多的人选择在大城市生活和工作】，政府不得不持续建造现代化高层建筑，以满足居民和企业对更多空间的需求。
steps.hint: As引导原因状语从句
steps.correctAnswer: As more and more people choose to live and work in big cities, the government has to keep building modern high-rise buildings to meet the needs of more space for either residence or business.

fullChinese: 结论是传统建筑的数量逐渐减少，导致城市失去了原有的独特风貌。
finalEnglish: As a result, there has been a decrease in the number of traditional buildings, which leads to the consequence that a city does not look unique anymore.
logicExplanation: 过渡短语+there be结构+非限制性定语从句+同位语从句。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 传统建筑的数量减少。
steps.hint: There has been a decrease in the number of traditional buildings
steps.correctAnswer: There has been a decrease in the number of traditional buildings.
keywords: there has been a decrease (数量减少)

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【结论是】传统建筑的数量【逐渐】减少。
steps.hint: As a result表结论是/结果是
steps.correctAnswer: As a result, there has been a decrease in the number of traditional buildings.
keywords: As a result (结果是/结论是)

steps.label: 添加结果状语从句
steps.chinese: 结论是传统建筑的数量逐渐减少，【导致城市失去了原有的独特风貌】。
steps.hint: which引导非限制性定语从句
steps.correctAnswer: As a result, there has been a decrease in the number of traditional buildings, which leads to the consequence that a city does not look unique anymore.

fullChinese: 学生行为不良的首要原因是出生率持续下降，导致家庭规模缩小、子女数量减少。
finalEnglish: The first reason for students' poor behavior is that the birth rate is decreasing so that families are becoming smaller with fewer children.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构，表语从句+结果状语从句，so that连接因果。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 首要原因是出生率下降。
steps.hint: The first reason is that the birth rate is decreasing
steps.correctAnswer: The first reason is that the birth rate is decreasing.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【学生行为不良的】首要原因是出生率【持续】下降。
steps.hint: for students' poor behavior作reason的后置定语
steps.correctAnswer: The first reason for students' poor behavior is that the birth rate is decreasing.

steps.label: 添加结果状语从句
steps.chinese: 学生行为不良的首要原因是出生率持续下降，【导致家庭规模缩小、子女数量减少】。
steps.hint: so that引导结果状语从句
steps.correctAnswer: The first reason for students' poor behavior is that the birth rate is decreasing so that families are becoming smaller with fewer children.

fullChinese: 一方面，父母对子女的成长具有重要影响。
finalEnglish: On the one hand, parents have a significant influence on their children's development.
logicExplanation: 简单的主谓宾结构，过渡词+介词短语修饰。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 父母具有影响。
steps.hint: Parents have an influence on their children's development
steps.correctAnswer: Parents have an influence on their children's development.
keywords: have an influence on (对…有影响)

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 父母对【子女的成长】具有【重要的】影响。
steps.hint: significant表重要的，children's development表子女的成长
steps.correctAnswer: Parents have a significant influence on their children's development.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【一方面】，父母对子女的成长具有重要影响。
steps.hint: On the one hand表一方面
steps.correctAnswer: On the one hand, parents have a significant influence on their children's development.

fullChinese: 换言之，教育孩子理解遵守规则、尊重他人的必要性，始终始于家庭环境，且普遍认为这是父母的责任。
finalEnglish: In other words, educating them to understand the need to obey rules and respect others always begins in the home and is widely thought to be the responsibility of parents.
logicExplanation: 并列主谓结构（begins...and is...），过渡词引出重述。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 教育孩子始于家庭环境，且这是父母的责任。
steps.hint: Educating them always begins in the home and is widely thought to be the responsibility of parents
steps.correctAnswer: Educating them always begins in the home and is widely thought to be the responsibility of parents.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【教育孩子理解遵守规则、尊重他人的必要性】始终始于家庭环境，且【普遍认为】这是父母的责任。
steps.hint: to understand the need to...是不定式短语作目的
steps.correctAnswer: Educating them to understand the need to obey rules and respect others always begins in the home and is widely thought to be the responsibility of parents.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【换言之】，教育孩子理解遵守规则、尊重他人的必要性，始终始于家庭环境，且普遍认为这是父母的责任。
steps.hint: In other words表换言之
steps.correctAnswer: In other words, educating them to understand the need to obey rules and respect others always begins in the home and is widely thought to be the responsibility of parents.

fullChinese: 例如，如果父母在排队购票时总是耐心等候，孩子也会通过模仿表现出同样的行为。
finalEnglish: For example, if parents always wait patiently in line to buy a ticket, their children will act in the same manner by imitation.
logicExplanation: 条件状语从句+主句，by imitation表方式。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 孩子会表现出同样的行为。
steps.hint: Their children will act in the same manner
steps.correctAnswer: Their children will act in the same manner.
keywords: in the same manner (以同样的方式)

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 孩子会【通过模仿】表现出【同样的】行为。
steps.hint: by imitation表通过模仿
steps.correctAnswer: Their children will act in the same manner by imitation.

steps.label: 添加条件状语从句
steps.chinese: 【如果父母在排队购票时总是耐心等候】，孩子也会通过模仿表现出同样的行为。
steps.hint: if引导条件从句
steps.correctAnswer: If parents always wait patiently in line to buy a ticket, their children will act in the same manner by imitation.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【例如】，如果父母在排队购票时总是耐心等候，孩子也会通过模仿表现出同样的行为。
steps.hint: For example放句首
steps.correctAnswer: For example, if parents always wait patiently in line to buy a ticket, their children will act in the same manner by imitation.

fullChinese: 相反，那些父母经常闯红灯的孩子，则很可能给社区带来诸多麻烦。
finalEnglish: By contrast, children of parents who often run a red light are likely to cause the community a lot of trouble.
logicExplanation: 主谓宾结构，含定语从句修饰parents，过渡词表对比。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 孩子带来麻烦。
steps.hint: Children cause trouble
steps.correctAnswer: Children cause trouble.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 孩子【很可能】【给社区】带来【诸多】麻烦。
steps.hint: be likely to表很可能，a lot of表诸多
steps.correctAnswer: Children are likely to cause the community a lot of trouble.

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 【那些父母经常闯红灯的】孩子，则很可能给社区带来诸多麻烦。
steps.hint: of parents who...用介词短语+定语从句修饰children
steps.correctAnswer: Children of parents who often run a red light are likely to cause the community a lot of trouble.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【相反】，那些父母经常闯红灯的孩子，则很可能给社区带来诸多麻烦。
steps.hint: By contrast表相反
steps.correctAnswer: By contrast, children of parents who often run a red light are likely to cause the community a lot of trouble.

fullChinese: 早年入学的另一个优势在于，儿童在社交能力方面发展更为迅速。
finalEnglish: Another advantage of going to school at an early age is that children develop faster socially.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构，表语从句说明优势内容。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 另一个优势在于儿童发展迅速。
steps.hint: Another advantage is that children develop faster
steps.correctAnswer: Another advantage is that children develop faster.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 【早年入学的】另一个优势在于，儿童【在社交能力方面】发展【更为】迅速。
steps.hint: of going to school at an early age作后置定语，socially表在社交方面
steps.correctAnswer: Another advantage of going to school at an early age is that children develop faster socially.

fullChinese: 他们能够结交朋友，并学会如何与同龄人相处。
finalEnglish: They make friends and learn how to get on with other children of a similar age.
logicExplanation: 并列谓语结构，how to+不定式作宾语。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 他们结交朋友，并学会如何相处。
steps.hint: They make friends and learn how to get on with other children
steps.correctAnswer: They make friends and learn how to get on with other children.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 他们能够结交朋友，并学会如何与【同龄人】相处。
steps.hint: of a similar age表同龄的
steps.correctAnswer: They make friends and learn how to get on with other children of a similar age.

fullChinese: 这种情况在家庭环境中往往难以实现——要么因为他们是独生子女，要么是因为兄弟姐妹年龄较大或较小。
finalEnglish: This is often not possible at home because they are the only child, or because their brothers or sisters are older or younger.
logicExplanation: 主句+两个并列原因状语从句，either...or...连接。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 这种情况难以实现。
steps.hint: This is not possible
steps.correctAnswer: This is not possible.

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 这种情况【在家庭环境中】【往往】难以实现。
steps.hint: at home表在家庭环境中，often表往往
steps.correctAnswer: This is often not possible at home.

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 这种情况在家庭环境中往往难以实现——【要么因为他们是独生子女，要么是因为兄弟姐妹年龄较大或较小】。
steps.hint: 两个because从句由or连接
steps.correctAnswer: This is often not possible at home because they are the only child, or because their brothers or sisters are older or younger.

fullChinese: 然而，那些不允许孩子在校外拥有足够闲暇时间进行休闲活动的父母，其实是在误判。
finalEnglish: However, the parents who do not allow their children sufficient free time for leisure activities outside school hours are misguided.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构，含定语从句修饰parents，过渡词表转折。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 父母是在误判。
steps.hint: The parents are misguided
steps.correctAnswer: The parents are misguided.

steps.label: 添加定语从句
steps.chinese: 【那些不允许孩子在校外拥有足够闲暇时间进行休闲活动的】父母，【其实】是在误判。
steps.hint: who引导定语从句修饰parents
steps.correctAnswer: The parents who do not allow their children sufficient free time for leisure activities outside school hours are misguided.

steps.label: 添加过渡词
steps.chinese: 【然而】，那些不允许孩子在校外拥有足够闲暇时间进行休闲活动的父母，其实是在误判。
steps.hint: However表转折
steps.correctAnswer: However, the parents who do not allow their children sufficient free time for leisure activities outside school hours are misguided.

fullChinese: 这些活动绝非只是浪费时间，因为它们并不涉及学业内容。
finalEnglish: Such activities are far from being a waste of time for the children simply because they are not academic.
logicExplanation: 主系表结构+原因状语从句，far from being表绝非。

steps.label: 纯净主干
steps.chinese: 这些活动绝非浪费时间。
steps.hint: Such activities are far from being a waste of time
steps.correctAnswer: Such activities are far from being a waste of time.
keywords: a waste of time (浪费时间)

steps.label: 添加修饰语
steps.chinese: 这些活动【对孩子们而言】绝非【只是】浪费时间。
steps.hint: for the children表对孩子们而言
steps.correctAnswer: Such activities are far from being a waste of time for the children.
keywords: for the children (对孩子们而言)

steps.label: 添加原因状语从句
steps.chinese: 这些活动对孩子们而言绝非只是浪费时间，【因为它们并不涉及学业内容】。
